nodes.name: Blue-crowned hanging parrot
nodes.summary: Blue-crowned hanging parrot（Blue-crowned hanging parrot，学名 Loriculus galgulus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于苏拉威西岛，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 苏拉威西岛
nodes.summary: 苏拉威西岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、蓝胸鹑、白喉林鸽等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The parrot inhabits forests, forest edges, swamps, riverine forest, bamboo patches, mangrove wooded gardens, and coconut groves, as well as plantations. Throughout its range, Sulawesi is the only area where more than one Loriculus species is found because intraspecific competition usually prevents other closely related species from overlapping

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The parrot inhabits forests, forest edges, swamps, riverine forest, bamboo patches, mangrove wooded gardens, and coconut groves, as well as plantations. Throughout its range, Sulawesi is the only area where more than one Loriculus species is found because intraspecific competition usually prevents other closely related species from overlapping
